title: calais clevelandii
intro: Calais clevelandii, also known as Cleveland's Wallflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Calais clevelandii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used topically in creams and salves for its therapeutic benefits.
